title: Resonance AI
description: Local AI in Minecraft. Runs LLM models offline via llama.cpp. All-in-one JAR with native binaries included, no setup needed.
body:
### This project is a work in progress! What you see now will likely differ significantly from the final version.
### Thank you for your support.


Resonance is a local AI mod for Minecraft. It runs real LLM models directly on your PC using llama.cpp. No internet, no API keys, no servers.

Features:
- All-in-one JAR, no manual setup
- Built-in model downloader with pause and background mode
- Multiple AI personalities
- Conversation memory between sessions
- Switch models without restarting
- Web UI at http://127.0.0.1:<port>

Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.20.1 with Forge 47.4.10+
- 4 GB RAM minimum
- GGUF model file (downloadable in-game)
## v0.7.0 Release Date Update

**v0.7.0 will be released in 1 week (May 20, 2026)**

Why the delay? We're training a **custom Llama model** specifically for Minecraft building:
- Feeding 2000+ real schematics into the AI
- Removing all unnecessary chat/general knowledge
- Acceleration of construction work by 2 times (possible)

Current v0.6.5 is stable and fully playable. The next update will be a **huge leap** in building quality.

Thank you for your patience! 🙏

— RS Games Studio
